title: setariopsis verticillata
intro: Setariopsis verticillata, also known as the bushy setaria or hairy setaria, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Setariopsis verticillata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a salve or ointment to leverage its medicinal properties.
